subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the Primal Point unto her who hath believed in God her Lord, who hath lamented in His separation and wept in His absence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدن نقطه الاولی الی التی آمنت بالله ربها و ناحت فی هجره و بکت فی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @love and unity
